nasb.text: ‘These, moreover, you shall detest among the birds; they are abhorrent, not to be eaten: the eagle and the vulture and the buzzard,

esv.text: “And these you shall detest among the birds; they shall not be eaten; they are detestable: the eagle, the bearded vulture, the black vulture,

cnv.text: “在鳥類中，你們要憎惡，也不可吃這些雀鳥：兀鷹、鵰、鷲、

ccb.text: “你们不可吃以下鸟类，要视为可憎之物。它们是雕、胡兀鹫、黑秃鹫、
